config.user_description: Add a Definition status/column (leftmost) to the Kanban ticket system. Tickets there can be assigned to AI (ready for development) or stay with human (comment like in ON_HOLD/Wartend). Definition tickets have two buttons: 'An KI übergeben' (set owner=AI, move to TODO) and 'Nach Zu erledigen' (move to TODO, owner unchanged). Rename 'Zu erledigen' column to 'Zu bereit'. Also add a create-ticket call to docs/API-TICKETS.md if missing.

discovery.test_command: backend: cd backend && npx playwright test | frontend: cd frontend && npx ng test --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless
